meta.title: Reddit KSP Challenge - One Engine To Rule Them All (January 2017)
meta.description:
After hours of live streaming I decided to do this week's reddit challenge - "One Engine To Rule Them All." The challenge was to use only one engine to get to the Mun and back. So, I present to you a quick little run to the Mun and back using only one engine! 

Follow on Twitch to join the action! http://twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Check out the Kerbal Subreddit for weekly challenges - http://reddit.com/r/kerbalspaceprogram

Follow me on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut
